title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・君臨する悪役

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! The only Umamusume to stand in the
way of Oguri Cap the Hero!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Super Creek! The winner of the autumn Tenno
Sho is Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Heheheh, this is what happens when my trainer
and I get serious!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You ran well, Oguri! I may have even been a
teensy bit nervous. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, you're a tough opponent... I didn't think
you'd stick it out on the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But this still isn't stettled. I want both you and
Tamtam to take me on next time.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Our final battle will be the Arima Kinen. To all our
fans out there, please come and watch the climax,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, we did it! Did I pull off the villain act?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then how about I praise you in a villainous
way as your reward?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Come, bow your head in submission.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Heheh! Such a fine subordinate. Yes you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her villainous act, Super Creek's touch is
as gentle as always.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Only the senior Arima Kinen remains. Winning
that will make me the queen...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And you, the queen's prized trainer, will be the
best in the world! ♪ Let's make our dream come
true—together.
